title: Respond to a property possession claim online on behalf of your client
description:
There’s no fee to respond to a claim. The response must be submitted within 14 days of your client receiving the claim pack in the post.

This service is also available in Welsh (Cymraeg).
completingYourResponse: Completing the response for your client
saveDraftInfo: You can save the response as a draft and return to it later. You’ll be able to review and edit the answers before submitting it on your client’s behalf.
uploadDocumentsInfo: After you finish answering the questions, you can upload any documents to support your client’s response.
claimantVisibilityInfo: The claimant will be able to see any documents you upload and the answers you provide on your client’s behalf.
whatYouWillNeed: What you’ll need to complete the response
provideDetailsInfo: You’ll be asked to provide or confirm details about your client, such as:
listItemDependants: any dependants your client supports financially
listItemCircumstances: your client’s circumstances and any exceptional hardship they’d experience if they had to leave their home
shareDetailsInfo: You can also share details about your client’s:
financialSituationInfo: You do not have to answer questions about your client’s financial situation, but sharing this information can help a judge understand their circumstances.
hmctsSupportInfo: If your client needs support to use HMCTS services, like step-free access to a court for their hearing, you can either request this as part of the response, or at a later time.
